message:
fix(ci): Add libpolly-18-dev for LLVM Polly optimizer

WAMR LLVM JIT build requires libPolly.a from the Polly polyhedral
optimizer. Add libpolly-18-dev to satisfy this dependency.

files.patch:
@@ -54,7 +54,8 @@ runs:
         # libcurl4-openssl-dev: Required for LLVMDebuginfod
         # libedit-dev: Required for LLVMLineEditor
         # libomp-18-dev: Required for LLVM OpenMP runtime (libomptarget)
-        sudo apt-get install -y llvm-18-dev libcurl4-openssl-dev libedit-dev libomp-18-dev
+        # libpolly-18-dev: Required for Polly polyhedral optimizer (libPolly.a)
+        sudo apt-get install -y llvm-18-dev libcurl4-openssl-dev libedit-dev libomp-18-dev libpolly-18-dev
 
     - name: Build Binaryen from source
       shell: bash
